factory_identity.observation: the .009 assembly drawing labels C94 below X7 and depicts a two-terminal rectangular capacitor

component_observations.observation: the upper physical C94 lead and lower R65 lead terminate in one common component-side solder pool; the separate lower C94 lead reaches its own lap-soldered joint
the overlapping July tile independently separates the two C94 leads and confirms the upper C94/R65 common landing
an independent oblique May view corroborates the same two separate C94 lead joints and the upper join to R65

solder_observation.observation: the globally registered C94.1 region contains several unrelated joints and rails but no uniquely matching through-hole landing; the component is lap-soldered on the component side

promotion_basis: two overlapping July target-board component views plus an independent May angle directly show C94.2 and R65.1 entering one physical landing; R65 pad orientation fixes that landing as VIDEO_OUT
non_promotion_basis: all three component views stop at the isolated lower lap joint and the registered solder region is non-unique; direct continuity is required
